subject: GRB 050326 : Planned XMM-Newton observation
body:
XMM-Newton will observe GRB 050326 (Swift-BAT trigger 111453,
Markwardt et al. GCN Circ 3143, Cummings et al. GCN Circ 3145)
at location (RA=00h 27m 34.1s, DEC=-71d 22' 33.6", J2000),
starting at 18:27:00 UT, on March 26, 2005,
for an exposure of 45800 seconds.
